# OS/system files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Editor files
.vscode/
.idea/
*.code-workspace

# Logs
*.log
npm-debug.log*

# Local env/config
.env
.env.local

# Dependency folders if added later
node_modules/
vendor/

# Build/cache folders if added later
dist/
build/
.cache/

# WordPress generated files that should not be committed
*.zip

# Sensitive files
*secret*
*secrets*
*api-key*
*apikey*
*.pem
*.key
